stemHtml: Refer to VFR chart ED-4 from the Jeppesen GSPRM 2017. You are planning a VFR flight from Landshut aerodrome (EDML, 48°30.7'N 012°02.0"E) to Deggendorf aerodrome (EDMW, 48°49.8'N 012°52.8"E) following the A92 highway. What is the height of the highest man-made obstacle in the vicinity of your route?
